_note: D3DMetal bridge runtime manifest. PE stubs + Unix bridge for Apple D3DMetal.framework integration.

d3d12.dll._note: PE stub: forwards D3D12 calls to d3dmetal_bridge.dll

dxgi.dll._note: PE stub: forwards DXGI calls to d3dmetal_bridge.dll

d3d11.dll._note: PE stub: forwards D3D11 calls to d3dmetal_bridge.dll

d3dmetal_bridge.dll._note: PE builtin: unixlib pair with d3dmetal_bridge.so, uses __wine_unix_call_dispatcher

d3dmetal_bridge.so._note: Unix bridge: dlopen's D3DMetal.framework, exports __wine_unix_call_funcs dispatch table

requires_framework.name: D3DMetal.framework
requires_framework._note: Apple's D3DMetal.framework, bundled from GPTK installation
